markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 6. DRIVERS' LICENSES [12500 - 15326]
### Chapter 1. Issuance of Licenses, Expiration, and Renewal [12500 - 13020]
#### Article 2. Student Licenses [12650 - 12661]
##### § 12653

A student license may be canceled by the principal of the school or by the department whenever, in the opinion of either, the safety of the licensee or other persons requires the action and shall be canceled upon the written request of the parent or other person who signed the consent to issue the license.

*(Amended by Stats. 1978, Ch. 162.)*

subsections.text: A student license may be canceled by the principal of the school or by the department whenever, in the opinion of either, the safety of the licensee or other persons requires the action and shall be canceled upon the written request of the parent or other person who signed the consent to issue the license.
